general.question: What is Genclip and how does AI video generation work?
general.answer: Genclip is an AI video generator that turns text prompts and images into cinematic videos. You describe a scene, optionally add a reference image, choose a model, and Genclip renders the final video in minutes.

commercial.question: Can I use Genclip AI videos commercially?
commercial.answer: Yes. Paid Genclip plans include commercial usage rights for generated videos, so you can use them in marketing, client work, social content, and business campaigns.

aiModels.question: Which AI models power Genclip?
aiModels.answer: Genclip currently focuses on Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 1.5 Pro workflows for cinematic text-to-video and image-to-video creation, with model options and credit usage shown directly in the generator.

credits.question: How does the Genclip credit system work?
credits.answer: Genclip uses credits for every generation. Credit usage depends on the model, duration, and output settings. You can buy one-time credit packs or subscribe for recurring credits and better value.

refund.question: Does Genclip offer refunds?
refund.answer: If a generation fails because of a system issue, Genclip can refund the credits. For subscription billing questions, review our Refund Policy or contact support within the eligible refund window.

support.question: How do I contact Genclip support?
support.answer: You can reach the Genclip support team anytime at support@genclip.studio. We help with billing, credits, account access, and video generation issues.

Footer.description: Genclip is an AI video generator for cinematic text-to-video and image-to-video creation.

PricingCards.slogan: Flexible plans for AI video creation
PricingCards.credit_guide: Credit guide: 8 Credits ≈ 4 seconds of video. Actual usage varies by model, duration, and quality.

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your Genclip account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:
resetPassword.validity: This link will expire in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
